## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **DeskFlow version:** [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Windows version:** [e.g. Windows 11 23H2]
- **Installed via:** [installer / dev build]

## Logs

If relevant, attach or paste the contents of `%APPDATA%\DeskFlow\logs\main.log`.

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem.
